SUMMARY

Strong expertise in modern JavaScript frameworks, cloud technologies, and agile methodologies.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages: JavaScript, Python, TypeScript, Java, SQL
Frontend: React, Vue.js, HTML5, CSS3, Redux, Next.js

Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Redis
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Jenkins, Git
Tools: Jira, Confluence, VS Code, Postman

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Full Stack Developer | Tech Innovations Inc. | 2021 - Present
- Architected and developed microservices-based e-commerce platform using React and Node.js
- Implemented GraphQL API serving 100K+ daily active users
- Deployed containerized applications on AWS using Docker and Kubernetes
- Mentored junior developers and conducted code reviews
- Improved application performance by 40% through optimization techniques

Full Stack Developer | Digital Solutions LLC | 2018 - 2021
- Built responsive web applications using Vue.js and Django
- Developed RESTful APIs for mobile and web clients
- Integrated third-party payment gateways and authentication services
- Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitHub Actions
- Collaborated with cross-functional teams in Agile/Scrum environment
